svg.title: WealthJOG — Final Brand Sheet v2
svg.desc: Complete brand sheet for WealthJOG with updated tagline: Every dollar has a direction.
svg.text: EVERY DOLLAR HAS A DIRECTION — INTER MEDIUM, TRACKED
Body copy and UI labels — Inter Regular 400
Free on Google Fonts · also available as system font on most platforms
Use on white or deep forest backgrounds
Maintain clear space = icon radius around logo
Recolor the icon or wordmark separately
